entity.label: Mephaath
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Splendour, a Levitical city (Josh. 21:37) of the tribe of Reuben (13:18).

nodes.label: Mephaath
nodes.description: Splendour, a Levitical city (Josh. 21:37) of the tribe of Reuben (13:18).

verses.text: And Jahazah, and Kedemoth, and Mephaath,
Kedemoth with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs; four cities.
Kedemoth also with her suburbs, and Mephaath with her suburbs:
And judgment is come upon the plain country; upon Holon, and upon Jahazah, and upon Mephaath,
